mapper.select: SELECT id, number_post AS numberPost, title, author, views, createdAt, updatedAt FROM posts WHERE deletedAt IS NULL ORDER BY number_post ASC
SELECT id, number_post AS numberPost, title, author, password, content, views, createdAt, updatedAt FROM posts WHERE id = #{id} AND deletedAt IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO posts ( number_post, title, author, password, content, views, createdAt, deletedAt ) VALUES ( nextval('post_number_seq'), #{title}, #{author}, #{password}, #{content}, 0, NOW(), NULL )
mapper.update: UPDATE posts SET title = #{title}, author = #{author}, content = #{content}, updatedAt = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deletedAt IS NULL
UPDATE posts SET deletedAt = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deletedAt IS NULL
UPDATE posts SET views = views + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deletedAt IS NULL
